title: Australian Fish Fritters
description: Crispy and flavorful fritters filled with fresh fish, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine flour, beer, and batter mix. Mix well.
2. Add the diced fish to the bowl and mix until just combined.
3. Add the beaten egg and mix until the mixture is smooth.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Heat a large non-stick pan over medium heat with a small amount of vegetable oil.
6. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the fritter mixture into the pan.
7. Flatten the fritter mixture slightly with a spatula.
8. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
9. Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
10. Enjoy your crispy and delicious Australian fish fritters!
